name: silica
description: Silica is used as an anticaking and bulking agent in food products to absorb moisture and prevent clumping.
raw_text: Silica (Explained + Products) Products Ingredients Decode INCI Login Register Login Register Products Ingredients Decode INCI Follow us on our new Insta page » Silica What-it-does: viscosity controlling , absorbent/mattifier Official CosIng Information All Functions: abrasive, absorbent, anticaking, bulking, opacifying, viscosity controlling Description: silicon dioxide CAS #: 7631-86-9 / 112945-52-5 / 60676-86-0 | EC #: 231-545-4 / 262-373-8 /310-060-2 Details A white powdery thing that's the major component of glass and sand. In cosmetics, it’s often in products that are supposed to keep your skin matte as it has great oil-absorbing abilities. It’s also used as a helper ingredient to thicken up products or suspend insoluble particles. [more] [more] [less] Something incorrect or missing? Let us know!
